question: What must be included with an expense claim and when is it due?
expected_answer_notes: Answer should mention receipts and submission within 30 days of purchase.

retrieved_docs.title: Expense Reimbursement Rules
retrieved_docs.text: Meals under 40 USD do not require pre-approval. Hotel bookings above 180 USD per night require director approval unless travel occurs during a peak event period. Expense claims must include receipts and be submitted within 30 days of purchase.

retrieved_docs.title: Laptop Replacement Standard
retrieved_docs.text: Engineering laptops are eligible for replacement every 36 months. Early replacement is permitted for repeated hardware failures, battery health below 70 percent, or inability to run required local development tooling.

retrieved_docs.title: Remote Work Policy
retrieved_docs.text: Employees may work remotely up to three days per week with manager approval. Core collaboration hours are 10:00 to 15:00 local time. Security training must be completed before accessing internal systems from personal networks.

final_prompt:
You are a concise QA assistant for eval exercises. Answer only from the retrieved context. If the context does not support the answer, say that clearly.
Retrieved context:
- [doc-003] Expense Reimbursement Rules (finance): Meals under 40 USD do not require pre-approval. Hotel bookings above 180 USD per night require director approval unless travel occurs during a peak event period. Expense claims must include receipts and be submitted within 30 days of purchase.
- [doc-004] Laptop Replacement Standard (it): Engineering laptops are eligible for replacement every 36 months. Early replacement is permitted for repeated hardware failures, battery health below 70 percent, or inability to run required local development tooling.
- [doc-001] Remote Work Policy (hr): Employees may work remotely up to three days per week with manager approval. Core collaboration hours are 10:00 to 15:00 local time. Security training must be completed before accessing internal systems from personal networks.
Question: What must be included with an expense claim and when is it due?
Answer:
answer: Expense claims must include receipts and be submitted within 30 days of purchase.
